text.light-overlay.config.title: Light Overlay Config
text.light-overlay.config.option.light_l: At what block light should the overlay turn green? Default is 1 for spawn-proofing against most mobs in the overworld and end.
text.light-overlay.config.option.scan_ra: The size of the square around you to display the Light Overlay. A value of 20 means rendering the light level 20 blocks in each direction horizontally.
text.light-overlay.config.option.hide_gr: Disables rendering for spots that would normally render green
text.light-overlay.config.option.hide_tr: Disables rendering on transparent blocks. This only includes transparent blocks on which mobs cannot spawn.
text.light-overlay.config.option.show_sp: Show Overlay on Blocks with Special Spawning Conditions
Enables rendering on blocks with special spawning conditions (e.g. Wither Roses which only allow Wither Skeletons to spawn, nothing else)
Opens the GitHub Issues page of this mod
text.light-overlay.config.option.overlay: Changes the way in which the Light Overlay gets presented
text.light-overlay.config.option.valid_c: The Overlay Color when the Light Level is equal or higher than the Threshold. Defaults to green
text.light-overlay.config.option.invalid: The Overlay Color when the Light Level is less than the Threshold. Defaults to red
text.light-overlay.config.option.scan_ra: The size of the Light Overlay above and below you to display the Light Overlay.
